# terrible_community_docker_docker_plugin (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `plugin_name` (String) Name of the plugin to operate on.

### Optional

- `alias` (String) Local name for plugin.
- `enable_timeout` (Number) Timeout in seconds.
- `force_remove` (Boolean) Remove even if the plugin is enabled.
- `plugin_options` (String) Dictionary of plugin settings.
- `state` (String) `absent` remove the plugin. `present` install the plugin, if it does not already exist. `enable` enable the plugin. `disable` disable the plugin.

### Read-Only

- `actions` (String) List of actions performed during task execution.
- `plugin` (String) Plugin inspection results for the affected plugin.
